name: @aliran/client
description: Aliran client — React Native (phone + Android TV) P2P OTT app
comment: This is a source skeleton. Generate the native project with the react-native-tvos CLI, then copy src/, backend/, and config/ in. Versions are indicative — see client/README.md and docs/client-build.md. react-native-bare-kit needs a real native build (NOT Expo Go).
